playlists.title: Calm
playlists.description: Soft instrumental music, gentle transitions, and unhurried melodies for resting, reading, reflecting, or whenever the day feels a little too heavy.

tracks.title: 01. Quiet Enough to Breathe
tracks.description: The opening piece in our Calm collection.

tracks.title: 01A. Quiet Enough to Breathe
tracks.description: The companion version to Quiet Enough to Breathe.

tracks.title: 02. Open Window Rain
tracks.description: A gentle pause shaped around rain and open space.

tracks.title: 02A. Open Window Rain
tracks.description: The companion version to Open Window Rain.

tracks.title: 03. Quietly Hopeful
tracks.description: A calm piece that makes room for quiet hope.

tracks.title: 03A. Quietly Hopeful
tracks.description: The companion version to Quietly Hopeful.

tracks.title: 04. Soft Harbor
tracks.description: A gentle place to settle for a few minutes.

tracks.title: 04A. Soft Harbor
tracks.description: The companion version to Soft Harbor.

tracks.title: 05. Soft Harbor Drift
tracks.description: The closing movement in the Calm collection.

tracks.title: 05A. Soft Harbor Drift
tracks.description: The companion closing version of Soft Harbor Drift.

playlists.title: Original Soundtracks
playlists.description: Two versions of the With Love, FMB original soundtrack, written and musically directed by Francine Marie Bautista (FMB).

tracks.title: With Love, FMB · Version 01
tracks.description: Original soundtrack, Version 01. Written by and under the musical direction of Francine Marie Bautista (FMB).

tracks.title: With Love, FMB · Version 02
tracks.description: Original soundtrack, Version 02. Written by and under the musical direction of Francine Marie Bautista (FMB).
